feelings.name: Hurt
feelings.text: And whenever you stand praying, forgive, if you have anything against anyone, so that your Father also who is in heaven may forgive you your trespasses.

feelings.name: Hateful
feelings.text: We love because he first loved us. If anyone says, 'I love God,' and hates his brother, he is a liar; for he who does not love his brother whom he has seen cannot love God whom he has not seen.

feelings.name: Critical
feelings.text: Let no corrupting talk come out of your mouths, but only such as is good for building up, as fits the occasion, that it may give grace to those who hear.

feelings.name: Frustrated
feelings.text: I have said these things to you, that in me you may have peace. In the world you will have tribulation. But take heart; I have overcome the world.

feelings.name: Annoyed
feelings.text: Refrain from anger, and forsake wrath! Fret not yourself; it tends only to evil. For the evildoers shall be cut off, but those who wait for the LORD shall inherit the land.

feelings.name: Jealous
feelings.text: Love is patient and kind; love does not envy or boast; it is not arrogant or rude. It does not insist on its own way; it is not irritable or resentful.

feelings.name: Respected
feelings.text: Show yourself in all respects to be a model of good works, and in your teaching show integrity, dignity.

feelings.name: Confident
feelings.text: And we know that for those who love God all things work together for good, for those who are called according to his purpose.

feelings.name: Worthy
feelings.text: For we are his workmanship, created in Christ Jesus for good works, which God prepared beforehand, that we should walk in them.

feelings.name: Proud
feelings.text: I have fought the good fight, I have finished the race, I have kept the faith.

feelings.name: Valuable
feelings.text: For in Christ Jesus you are all sons of God, through faith.

feelings.name: Important
feelings.text: Because you are precious in my eyes, and honored, and I love you, I give men in return for you, peoples in exchange for your life.

feelings.name: Loving
feelings.text: A new commandment I give to you, that you love one another: just as I have loved you, you also are to love one another. By this all people will know that you are my disciples, if you have love for one another.

feelings.name: Trusting
feelings.text: Trust in the LORD with all your heart, and do not lean on your own understanding. In all your ways acknowledge him, and he will make straight your paths.

feelings.name: Peaceful
feelings.text: Blessed are the peacemakers, for they shall be called sons of God.

feelings.name: Thoughtful
feelings.text: Set your minds on things that are above, not on things that are on earth.

feelings.name: Satisfied
feelings.text: Jesus said to her, 'Everyone who drinks of this water will be thirsty again, but whoever drinks of the water that I will give him will never be thirsty again. The water that I will give him will become in him a spring of water welling up to eternal life.'

feelings.name: Grateful
feelings.text: Give thanks in all circumstances; for this is the will of God in Christ Jesus for you.

feelings.name: Excited
feelings.text: Let everything that has breath praise the LORD! Praise the LORD!

feelings.name: Hopeful
feelings.text: For in this hope we were saved. Now hope that is seen is not hope. For who hopes for what he sees? But if we hope for what we do not see, we wait for it with patience.

feelings.name: Energetic
feelings.text: But seek first the kingdom of God and his righteousness, and all these things will be added to you.

feelings.name: Inspired
feelings.text: When the Spirit of truth comes, he will guide you into all the truth, for he will not speak on his own authority, but whatever he hears he will speak, and he will declare to you the things that are to come.

feelings.name: Cheerful
feelings.text: A joyful heart is good medicine, but a crushed spirit dries up the bones.

feelings.name: Creative
feelings.text: And he has filled him with the Spirit of God, with skill, with intelligence, with knowledge, and with all craftsmanship.

feelings.name: Depressed
feelings.text: When the righteous cry for help, the LORD hears and delivers them out of all their troubles. The LORD is near to the brokenhearted and saves the crushed in spirit.

feelings.name: Lonely
feelings.text: Fear not, for I am with you; be not dismayed, for I am your God; I will strengthen you, I will help you, I will uphold you with my righteous right hand.

feelings.name: Ashamed
feelings.text: You are the light of the world. A city set on a hill cannot be hidden... In the same way, let your light shine before others, so that they may see your good works and give glory to your Father who is in heaven.

feelings.name: Guilty
feelings.text: For all have sinned and fall short of the glory of God, and are justified by his grace as a gift, through the redemption that is in Christ Jesus.

feelings.name: Bored
feelings.text: Whatever you do, work heartily, as for the Lord and not for men, knowing that from the Lord you will receive the inheritance as your reward. You are serving the Lord Christ.

feelings.name: Tired
feelings.text: Come to me, all who labor and are heavy laden, and I will give you rest.

feelings.name: Anxious
feelings.text: Do not be anxious about anything, but in everything by prayer and supplication with thanksgiving let your requests be made known to God. And the peace of God, which surpasses all understanding, will guard your hearts and your minds in Christ Jesus.

feelings.name: Confused
feelings.text: For God is not a God of confusion but of peace.

feelings.name: Insecure
feelings.text: Finally, brothers, whatever is true, whatever is honorable, whatever is just, whatever is pure, whatever is lovely, whatever is commendable, if there is any excellence, if there is anything worthy of praise, think about these things.

feelings.name: Helpless
feelings.text: Likewise the Spirit helps us in our weakness. For we do not know what to pray for as we ought, but the Spirit himself intercedes for us with groanings too deep for words.

feelings.name: Rejected
feelings.text: If the world hates you, know that it has hated me before it hated you.

feelings.name: Meek
feelings.text: Blessed are the meek, for they shall inherit the earth.
